name: Yuki Souma
description:
__Height:__ 170.5 cm / 5'7"
__Zodiac Animal:__ Rat

Known as "The Prince" or "Prince Yuki" at school, Yuki is very pretty and refined, and has many admirers at school, but has a hard time being social. He wishes that he could be with people as friends, rather than admired and worshiped from afar. Yuki has suffered a traumatic childhood at the hands of [Akito](https://anilist.co/character/374), the head of the Soma clan, who locked up and mentally tortured him. Because of this, Yuki has a somewhat low sense of worth and is claustrophobic. With [Tohru's](https://anilist.co/character/207) help, however, Yuki is gradually able to loosen up. He is jealous of [Kyo](https://anilist.co/character/209) because he thinks Kyo can have a normal life, which Yuki always wanted.

(Source: Wikipedia)
